product: Multi-table transactions are now in Public Preview
tagline: You can now group multiple SQL statements across multiple tables into a single atomic transaction using BEGIN ATOMIC ...
what_it_does: You can now group multiple SQL statements across multiple tables into a single atomic transaction using BEGIN ATOMIC ... All changes succeed together or roll back together, ensuring data consistency across your operations. Multi table transactions require catalog commits enabled on participating tables and are supported on Unity Catalog managed Delta tables.
why_it_matters: Best practices Follow these practices to reduce conflicts and optimize transaction performance.
plain_summary: You can now group multiple SQL statements across multiple tables into a single atomic transaction using BEGIN ATOMIC ... All changes succeed together or roll back together, ensuring data consistency across your operations.

capabilities.title: Be Unity Catalog managed tables
capabilities.desc: Be Unity Catalog managed tables (Delta Lake or Iceberg)

capabilities.title: For non-interactive transactions, use any
capabilities.desc: For non-interactive transactions, use any SQL warehouse, serverless compute, or cluster running Databricks Runtime 18.0 and above.

capabilities.title: For interactive transactions, use any
capabilities.desc: For interactive transactions, use any SQL warehouse.

key_takeaway: You can now group multiple SQL statements across multiple tables into a single atomic transaction using BEGIN ATOMIC ...
